query: SELECT item_key, funding_source, section, scenario FROM project_cash_flow_settings WHERE project_id = 4 AND item_key IN ('supervision_fee', 'community_fee_construction', 'developer_fee_construction', 'sales_commission', 'community_fee') ORDER BY scenario, item_key;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4E8R6wFgxnBhGVF.1a403e654cd7 --database Q366eAYG4Q7iaM8VuAmmFX --execute SELECT item_key, funding_source, section, scenario FROM project_cash_flow_settings WHERE project_id = 4 AND item_key IN ('supervision_fee', 'community_fee_construction', 'developer_fee_construction', 'sales_commission', 'community_fee') ORDER BY scenario, item_key;
